title: Far-Wing Implied-Volatility Surface Recovery — extrapolating symbolic regression
strategies: flat-vol constant: predict the mean training implied vol (ignores smile) -> ~0.1
linear least squares sigma ~ 1 + k + t: captures skew + term structure but misses the k^2 smile, so it extrapolates poorly into the wings
structured basis [1, t, k, k^2, k^2*exp(-r*t)] with a grid search over the hidden smile-decay rate r, coefficients by least squares
alternatives: finer / continuous optimisation of r, ridge-regularised bases, or extra maturity cross-terms to trade complexity penalty against held-out wing error
